message:
feat(session): implement bulk_insert and bulk_update operations (bd-kgpu)

Add bulk operations that bypass identity map and change tracking:

- bulk_insert() - Multi-row INSERT with automatic batching (default 1000)
- bulk_insert_with_batch_size() - Custom batch size
- bulk_update() - Individual UPDATE per model, no tracking overhead
- Both methods return total affected row count
- Empty collection handling returns 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
